calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Heide and Paul Dohrmann for respondent/plaintiff Integrated Cleaning Solutions.
Terry Carlson, Esq. for appellant/defendant Cosmopolitan Cafe, with owner Michael Suverkrubbe and witness Roy Austin.

This cause comes on regularly for hearing on trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Andrew Heide testifies on behalf of Plaintiff/Respondent Integrated Cleaning Solutions, Inc. Witness Paul Dohrmann is examined on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant/Appellant Michael Suverkrubbe testifies on behalf of Cosmopolitan Cafe. Witness Roy Austin is also examined.

Documentary evidence is exchanged between the parties and submitted for consideration. The matter is submitted.

JPT John Gulick, Clerks Clark Banayad/Jeanie Dobbs, Not reported (525)
